zh.Beerfelden, Odenwaldkreis, Hessen, Germa: 德國賀瑟奧登瓦爾德可萊斯貝爾費爾登
zh.Beerfelden, Odenwaldkreis, Hessen, Deuts: 德國賀瑟奧登瓦爾德可萊斯貝爾費爾登
zh.lifeSummary: 當Hanß Michael Kumpft於大約1560年出生在德國賀瑟奧登瓦爾德可萊斯貝爾費爾登時，他的父親Hanß Michael Kumpft32歲，母親Appollonia22歲。他於大約1583年與Anna在德國賀瑟奧登瓦爾德可萊斯貝爾費爾登結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1617年在他的家鄉享年58歲。

zh-hans.Beerfelden, Odenwaldkreis, Hessen, Germa: 德国賀瑟奧登瓦爾德可萊斯貝爾費爾登
zh-hans.Beerfelden, Odenwaldkreis, Hessen, Deuts: 德国賀瑟奧登瓦爾德可萊斯貝爾費爾登
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Hanß Michael Kumpft于大约1560年出生在德国賀瑟奧登瓦爾德可萊斯貝爾費爾登时，他的父亲Hanß Michael Kumpft32岁，母亲Appollonia22岁。他于大约1583年与Anna在德国賀瑟奧登瓦爾德可萊斯貝爾費爾登结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1617年在他的家乡享年58岁。

nameMeanings.name: Kumpft
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Hermann, Kurt, Otto.
German: nickname for a short stout man, from Middle High German kumpf ‘(small) measure of grain, pouch (for a whetstone)’. Compare Kump .

variants.name: Kump
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Erwin, Mathias, Alois, Gerhard, Traude.
German: metonymic occupational name for a bowl maker, from Middle Low German kump ‘(wooden) bowl’.
German: habitational name from a place so named in Westphalia.

nameMeanings.name: Hanß
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

nameMeanings.name: Michael
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of a common biblical name (meaning ‘who is like God?’ in Hebrew) borne by one of the archangels, the protector of the ancient Hebrews, who is also regarded as a saint of the Catholic Church. In the Middle Ages, Michael was regarded as captain of the heavenly host (see Revelation 12:7–9), symbol of the Church Militant, and patron of soldiers. He was often depicted bearing a flaming sword. The name is also borne by a Persian prince and ally of Belshazzar mentioned in the Book of Daniel. Since the early 1900s it has been one of the most enduringly popular boys' names in the English-speaking world.  See also  Michal .

en.lifeSummary: When Hanß Michael Kumpft was born about 1560, in Beerfelden, Odenwaldkreis, Hesse, Germany, his father, Hanß Michael Kumpft, was 32 and his mother, Appollonia, was 22. He married Anna about 1583, in Beerfelden, Odenwaldkreis, Hesse, Germany. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 1 daughter. He died in 1617, in his hometown, at the age of 58.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Hanß Michael Kumpft est né environ 1560, à Beerfelden, Odenwaldkreis, Hessen, Allemagne, son père, Hanß Michael Kumpft, avait 32 ans et sa mère, Appollonia, avait 22 ans. Il a épousé Anna environ 1583, à Beerfelden, Odenwaldkreis, Hessen, Allemagne. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé en 1617, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 58 ans.

historicEvents.description:
ab 1567 wurde Hessen geteilt in Hessen-Darmstadt (ab 1806 Großherzogtum Hessen) und Hessen-Kassel (ab 1806 Kurhessen).
ebenfalls ab 1806 entstand Nassau aus einem Teil von Kurhessen

de.lifeSummary: Als Hanß Michael Kumpft um 1560 in Beerfelden, Odenwaldkreis, Hessen, Deutschland geboren wurde, war sein Vater Hanß Michael Kumpft 32 und seine Mutter Appollonia 22. Er hat um 1583 in Beerfelden, Odenwaldkreis, Hessen, Deutschland Anna geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb 1617 im Alter von 58 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Hanß Michael Kumpft è nato il circa 1560 nel Beerfelden, Odenwaldkreis, Hessen, Germania, il suo padre, Hanß Michael Kumpft, aveva 32 anni e il suo madre, Appollonia, aveva 22 anni. Lui sposato Anna circa 1583, nel Beerfelden, Odenwaldkreis, Hessen, Germania. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 1 figlia. Morì nel 1617, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 58 anni.

ja.Beerfelden, Odenwaldkreis, Hessen, Germa: ドイツヘセンオデンワルドクレイスビールフエルデン
ja.Beerfelden, Odenwaldkreis, Hessen, Deuts: ドイツヘセンオデンワルドクレイスビールフエルデン
ja.lifeSummary: Hanß Michael Kumpftが約1560年にドイツヘセンオデンワルドクレイスビールフエルデンで生まれた時，父Hanß Michael Kumpftは32歳，母Appolloniaは22歳であった。約1583年にドイツヘセンオデンワルドクレイスビールフエルデンでAnnaと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1617年に故郷で58歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Hanß Michael Kumpft(이)가 대략 1560년 독일 헤센 오데월드크레이스 브이르펠든에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Hanß Michael Kumpft(은)는 32세였고, 그의 어머니 Appollonia(은)는 22세였다. 그는 대략 1583년 독일 헤센 오데월드크레이스 브이르펠든에서 Anna(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1617년 그의 고향에서 58세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Hanß Michael Kumpft nasceu aproximadamente 1560, em Beerfelden, Odenwaldkreis, Hessen, Alemanha, seu pai, Hanß Michael Kumpft, tinha 32 anos e sua mãe, Appollonia, tinha 22 anos. Ele casou-se com Anna aproximadamente 1583, em Beerfelden, Odenwaldkreis, Hessen, Alemanha. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 1617, em sua cidade natal, com 58 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Hanß Michael Kumpft родился около 1560 г. в местности бирфелден, оденвалдкрис, Гессен, Германия, его отцу по имени Hanß Michael Kumpft было 32 года, а матери, которую звали Appollonia, 22. Он женился на женщине по имени Anna около 1583 г. в местности бирфелден, оденвалдкрис, Гессен, Германия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 1 дочь. Он умер в 1617 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 58 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Hanß Michael Kumpft nació aproximadamente 1560, en Beerfelden, Odenwaldkreis, Hessen, Alemania, su papá, Hanß Michael Kumpft, tenía 32 años y su mamá, Appollonia, tenía 22 años. Se casó con Anna aproximadamente 1583, en Beerfelden, Odenwaldkreis, Hessen, Alemania. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 1 hija. Murió en 1617, en su pueblo, a la edad de 58 años.
